lord all men can't be dogs.title: Lord, All Men Can't Be Dogs
lord all men can't be dogs.keywords: faith, relationships, temptation, spirits, marriage, greed, deliverance, urban drama, Black cinema
lord all men can't be dogs.description: The lives of Lisa and Tim Johnson are entangled with four spirits residing in their home, leading to a story of temptation, greed, and ultimately deliverance, blended with humor.

miami confidential.title: Miami Confidential
miami confidential.keywords: human trafficking, undercover, detective, model, South Florida, murder, sister, crime
miami confidential.description: After her older sister is murdered inside a human trafficking ring, a young police detective takes leave from her job to go undercover as a model in South Florida to stop the operation.

saving westbrook.title: Saving Westbrook High
saving westbrook.keywords: high school, budget cuts, community, school closing, teachers, education, family
saving westbrook.description: Students, parents, and faculty face an uphill battle as they try to prevent their beloved Westbrook High from closing due to budget cuts. A new principal and committed teachers fight to maintain normalcy amid the upheaval.

mardi gras reunion.title: Mardi Gras Reunion
mardi gras reunion.keywords: Louisiana, homecoming, family, holidays, autoimmune disease, small town, healing, Mardi Gras, reunion, romance
mardi gras reunion.description: Donald Henson left his home in Algiers, Louisiana to escape small town living. Years later, a rare auto-immune disease brings him home for the holidays to heal old wounds.
